nasb.text: Then Joseph said to him, “This is the interpretation of it: the three branches are three days;

esv.text: Then Joseph said to him, “This is its interpretation: the three branches are three days.

cnv.text: 約瑟對他說：“這夢的解釋是這樣：三根枝子就是三天。

ccb.text: 约瑟说：“这梦的意思是，三根枝子代表三天，

csbs.text: 约瑟对他说：“梦的解释是这样的：三根枝子就是三天。
